description.para: CFG0 is for Qsel and multiplication passes CFG1 is for Mont digits CFG2 is for location size CFG5 is for No.of groups
The Status Register(SR) indicates the current state of RSA device.

briefdescription.para: Enum to hold RSA key operation states.
Enum to hold RSA key status.
Used for setting the state of RSA operation.
Used for selecting the RSA operation.
This function encodes the given message using PKCS #1 v2.0 RSA Optimal Asymmetric Encryption Padding scheme.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSecure_RsaOaepParam instance.
is address where the encoded data is stored.

listitem.para: Get the actual message length based on the hash algorithm
Encode the message in to OutputAddr

briefdescription.para: This function decodes the given message which is encoded with RSA Optimal Asymmetric Encryption Padding scheme i.e.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSecure_RsaOaepParam instance.
is the address where decrypted output data is stored.

briefdescription.para: This function returns pointer to XSecure_RsaKeyMgmt instance.

listitem.para: RsaKeyMgmt is pointer to the XSecure_RsaKeyMgmt instances.

briefdescription.para: This function returns RSA key index based on RsaKeyStatus.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the variable containing RSA free index.
Key status to be checked.

briefdescription.para: This function returns RSA free key generation param.

listitem.para: Pointer to XSecure_RsaKeyGenParam or NULL otherwise.

briefdescription.para: This function performs the RSA key initialization.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to XSecure_RsaKeyGenParam.
is the pointer to XSecure_RsaKeyPtr which holds the state of key that needs to be generated.
Length of RSA key length in bytes.

listitem.para: XSECURE_RSA_INVALID_PARAM - If input parameter is invalid.

inbodydescription.para: < Initialize Public key components to KeyPairState

listitem.para: Release the RSA engine from reset

briefdescription.para: This function performs the RSA key generation in steps.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSecure_RsaKeyPtr.
Size of the key generation steps in terms of quant size i.e. Half-size RSA key.

listitem.para: XSECURE_RSA_INVALID_PARAM - If input parameter is invalid.
Release the RSA engine from reset

briefdescription.para: This function removes key pair generation task from scheduler.

listitem.para: XSECURE_ERR_REMOVE_TASK_SCHEDULER - If failed to remove task from scheduler.
Remove key pair generation task from scheduler

briefdescription.para: This function performs the RSA key generation.

listitem.para: XSECURE_ERR_RSA_KEY_PAIR_GEN_SCHEDULER - If RSA key pair generation fails.
State machine for RSA key generation Note: RSA key generation operation is non-reentrant hence state is maintained for whole operation

briefdescription.para: This function encodes the given message using RSA OAEP and encrypts it.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSecure_Rsa instance.
is a pointer to the XSecure_RsaOaepParam instance.

briefdescription.para: This function decodes the given message and decrypts it using RSA OAEP.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XSecure_RsaPrivKey instance.
is a pointer to the XSecure_RsaOaepParam instance.

briefdescription.para: This function adds periodic task of generation RSA key pair to scheduler.

listitem.para: XSECURE_ERR_ADD_TASK_SCHEDULER - If failed to add task to scheduler.

briefdescription.para: This function returns RSA key inuse index.

detaileddescription.para: API to destroy key pair that is in use.

listitem.para: KeyInUse To indicate the key that is in use

briefdescription.para: This function destroys the RSA key in use.

detaileddescription.para: API to add key pair generation to scheduler.

briefdescription.para: This function returns RSA private key.

parameterdescription.para: Index of the RSA key to retrieve.

listitem.para: Pointer to XSecure_RsaPrivKey or NULL otherwise.

briefdescription.para: This function returns RSA public key.

detaileddescription.para: API to retrieve RSA KEY in use index.

listitem.para: Pointer to XSecure_RsaPubKey or NULL otherwise.

memberdef.argsstring: (XSecure_Rsa *InstancePtr, u64 Mod, u64 ModExt, u64 ModExpo)
memberdef.name: XSecure_RsaInitialize_64Bit

briefdescription.para: This function initializes a a XSecure_Rsa structure with the default values located at a 64-bit address required for operating the RSA cryptographic engine.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSecure_Rsa instance
Address of the key Modulus of key size
Address of the pre-calculated exponential (R^2 Mod N) value, or 0 if user doesn't have pre-calculated R^2 Mod N value (control will take care of this calculation internally)
Address of the buffer which contains key exponent

simplesect.para: Modulus, ModExt and ModExpo are part of partition signature when authenticated boot image is generated by bootgen, else the all of them should be extracted from the key

listitem.para: Stores the base address of RSA core registers
Stores the base address of RSA core registers

briefdescription.para: This function initializes a a XSecure_Rsa structure with the default values required for operating the RSA cryptographic engine.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSecure_Rsa instance
A character Pointer which contains the key Modulus of key size
A Pointer to the pre-calculated exponential (R^2 Mod N) value, or NULL if user doesn't have pre-calculated R^2 Mod N value (control will take care of this calculation internally)
Pointer to the buffer which contains key exponent

simplesect.para: Modulus, ModExt and ModExpo are part of partition signature when authenticated boot image is generated by bootgen, else the all of them should be extracted from the key

memberdef.argsstring: (const u64 Signature, const u64 Hash, u32 HashLen)
memberdef.name: XSecure_RsaSignVerification_64Bit

briefdescription.para: This function verifies the RSA decrypted data located at a 64-bit address provided is either matching with the provided expected hash by taking care of PKCS padding.

parameterdescription.para: Address of the buffer which holds the decrypted RSA signature
Address of the buffer which has the hash calculated on the data to be authenticated
Length of Hash used For SHA3 it should be 48 bytes
Address of the buffer which holds the decrypted RSA signature
Address of the buffer which has the hash calculated on the data to be authenticated
Length of Hash used For SHA3 it should be 48 bytes

briefdescription.para: This function verifies the RSA decrypted data provided is either matching with the provided expected hash by taking care of PKCS padding.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the buffer which holds the decrypted RSA signature
Pointer to the buffer which has the hash calculated on the data to be authenticated
Length of Hash used For SHA3 it should be 48 bytes
Pointer to the buffer which holds the decrypted RSA signature
Pointer to the buffer which has the hash calculated on the data to be authenticated
Length of Hash used For SHA3 it should be 48 bytes

memberdef.argsstring: (XSecure_Rsa *InstancePtr, u64 Input, u32 Size, u64 Result)
memberdef.name: XSecure_RsaPublicEncrypt_64Bit

briefdescription.para: This function handles the RSA encryption for data available at 64-bit address with the public key components provided when initializing the RSA cryptographic core with the XSecure_RsaInitialize function.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSecure_Rsa instance
Address of the buffer which contains the input data to be encrypted
Key size in bytes, Input size also should be same as Key size mentioned. Inputs supported are XSECURE_RSA_4096_KEY_SIZE, XSECURE_RSA_2048_KEY_SIZE, or XSECURE_RSA_3072_KEY_SIZE
Address of buffer where resultant decrypted data to be stored

listitem.para: XSECURE_RSA_STATE_MISMATCH_ERROR - If State mismatch is occurred

simplesect.para: The Size passed here needs to match the key size used in the XSecure_RsaInitialize function

briefdescription.para: This function handles the RSA encryption with the public key components provided when initializing the RSA cryptographic core with the XSecure_RsaInitialize function.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSecure_Rsa instance
Pointer to the buffer which contains the input data to be encrypted
Key size in bytes, Input size also should be same as Key size mentioned. Inputs supported are XSECURE_RSA_4096_KEY_SIZE, XSECURE_RSA_2048_KEY_SIZE, or XSECURE_RSA_3072_KEY_SIZE
Pointer to the buffer where resultant decrypted data to be stored

listitem.para: XSECURE_RSA_STATE_MISMATCH_ERROR - If State mismatch is occurred

simplesect.para: The Size passed here needs to match the key size used in the XSecure_RsaInitialize function

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSecure_Rsa instance
Pointer to the buffer which contains the input data to be encrypted

Key size in bytes, Input size also should be same as Key size mentioned. Inputs supported are
XSECURE_RSA_4096_KEY_SIZE
XSECURE_RSA_2048_KEY_SIZE
XSECURE_RSA_3072_KEY_SIZE
Pointer to the buffer where resultant decrypted data to be stored

listitem.para: XSECURE_RSA_STATE_MISMATCH_ERROR - If State mismatch is occurred

simplesect.para: The Size passed here needs to match the key size used in the XSecure_RsaInitialize function

memberdef.argsstring: (XSecure_Rsa *InstancePtr, u64 Input, u32 Size, u64 Result)
memberdef.name: XSecure_RsaPrivateDecrypt_64Bit

briefdescription.para: This function handles the RSA decryption for data available at 64-bit address with the private key components provided when initializing the RSA cryptographic core with the XSecure_RsaInitialize function.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSecure_Rsa instance
Address of the buffer which contains the input data to be decrypted
Key size in bytes, Input size also should be same as Key size mentioned. Inputs supported are XSECURE_RSA_4096_KEY_SIZE, XSECURE_RSA_2048_KEY_SIZE, or XSECURE_RSA_3072_KEY_SIZE
Address of buffer where resultant decrypted data to be stored

listitem.para: XSECURE_RSA_DATA_VALUE_ERROR - If input data is greater than modulus
XSECURE_RSA_STATE_MISMATCH_ERROR - If State mismatch is occurred

simplesect.para: RSA private key decryption data should be less than modulus.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSecure_Rsa instance
Address of the buffer which contains the input data to be decrypted
Key size in bytes, Input size also should be same as Key size mentioned. Inputs supported are XSECURE_RSA_4096_KEY_SIZE, XSECURE_RSA_2048_KEY_SIZE, or XSECURE_RSA_3072_KEY_SIZE
Address of buffer where resultant decrypted data to be stored

listitem.para: XSECURE_RSA_DATA_VALUE_ERROR - If input data is greater than modulus
XSECURE_RSA_STATE_MISMATCH_ERROR - If State mismatch is occurred
The Size passed here needs to match the key size used in the XSecure_RsaInitialize function
RSA private key decryption data should be lesser than modulus.

briefdescription.para: This function handles the RSA decryption with the private key components provided when initializing the RSA cryptographic core with the XSecure_RsaInitialize function.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSecure_Rsa instance
Pointer to the buffer which contains the input data to be decrypted
Key size in bytes, Input size also should be same as Key size mentioned. Inputs supported are XSECURE_RSA_4096_KEY_SIZE, XSECURE_RSA_2048_KEY_SIZE, or XSECURE_RSA_3072_KEY_SIZE
Pointer to the buffer where resultant decrypted data to be stored

listitem.para: XSECURE_RSA_DATA_VALUE_ERROR - If input data is greater than modulus
XSECURE_RSA_STATE_MISMATCH_ERROR - If State mismatch is occurred

simplesect.para: RSA private key decryption data should be less than modulus.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSecure_Rsa instance
Pointer to the buffer which contains the input data to be decrypted

Key size in bytes, Input size also should be same as Key size mentioned. Inputs supported are
XSECURE_RSA_4096_KEY_SIZE,
XSECURE_RSA_2048_KEY_SIZE
XSECURE_RSA_3072_KEY_SIZE
Pointer to the buffer where resultant decrypted data to be stored

listitem.para: XSECURE_RSA_DATA_VALUE_ERROR - If input data is greater than modulus
XSECURE_RSA_STATE_MISMATCH_ERROR - If State mismatch is occurred

simplesect.para: The Size passed here needs to match the key size used in the XSecure_RsaInitialize function

briefdescription.para: This function writes all the RSA data used for decryption (Modulus, Exponent) at the corresponding offsets in RSA RAM.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSecure_Rsa instance

briefdescription.para: This function writes data to RSA RAM at a given offset.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSecure_Aes instance
Address of the data to be written to RSA RAM
Offset for the data to be written in RSA RAM

briefdescription.para: This function calculates the MINV value and put it into RSA core registers.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to XSeure_Rsa instance

simplesect.para: MINV is the 32-bit value of -M mod 2**32, where M is LSB 32 bits of the original modulus

listitem.para: Store calculated MINV value in RSA registers

briefdescription.para: This function reads back the resulting data from RSA RAM.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSecure_Rsa instance
Address of the location where RSA output data will be written

listitem.para: Read the data from RSA RAM buffer and store it in the destination address

memberdef.argsstring: (const XSecure_Rsa *InstancePtr, u32 Cfg0, u32 Cfg1, u32 Cfg2, u32 Cfg5)
memberdef.name: XSecure_RsaDataLenCfg

briefdescription.para: This function updates data length configuration.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSecure_Rsa instance.
QSEL, Multiplication passes.
Number of Montgomery digits.
Memory location size.
Number of groups.

briefdescription.para: This function stores the base address of RSA core registers.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSecure_Rsa instance

memberdef.argsstring: (XSecure_Rsa *InstancePtr, u64 Input, u64 Result, XSecure_RsaOps RsaOp, u32 KeySize)
memberdef.name: XSecure_RsaOperation

briefdescription.para: This function handles the Public encryption and private decryption of RSA operations with provided inputs.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSecure_Rsa instance
Address of the buffer which contains the input data to be encrypted/decrypted
Address of buffer where resultant encrypted/decrypted data to be stored
Flag to inform the operation to be performed is either encryption/decryption
Size of the key in bytes

listitem.para: Check if modulus exponent buffer is non zero
Put Modulus, exponent, Mod extension in RSA RAM
Time out occurred or RSA error observed
Zeroize and Verify RSA memory space

briefdescription.para: This function clears whole RSA memory space.

detaileddescription.para: This function clears stored exponent, modulus and exponentiation key components along with digest

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XSecure_Rsa instance

listitem.para: Zeroize and verify whole RSA RAM space

briefdescription.para: This function returns PKCS padding as per the silicon version.
This function verifies whole RSA or ECDSA memory space.

parameterdescription.para: BaseAddress of RSA or ECDSA controller.

briefdescription.para: This function clears and verifies whole RSA or ECDSA memory space.

parameterdescription.para: BaseAddress of ECDSA or RSA controller.

listitem.para: Clears whole RSA or ECDSA RAM space
Verify whether whole RSA or ECDSA RAM space is zeroized or not

memberdef.argsstring: (u32 SubsystemId, u32 SrcAddrLow, u32 SrcAddrHigh, u32 DstAddrLow, u32 DstAddrHigh)
memberdef.name: XSecure_RsaEncrypt

briefdescription.para: This function handler calls XSecure_RsaInitialize and XSecure_RsaPublicEncrypt server APIs.

parameterdescription.para: Subsystem ID.
Lower 32 bit address of the XSecure_RsaInParam structure
Higher 32 bit address of the XSecure_RsaInParam structure
Lower 32 bit address of the output data where encrypted data to be stored
Higher 32 bit address of the output data where encrypted data to be stored

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the Rsa encryption is successful
XST_FAILURE - If there is a failure
Validate internal address fields in the copied structure

briefdescription.para: This function handler extracts the payload params with respect to XSECURE_API_RSA_SIGN_VERIFY IPI command and calls XSecure_RsaSignVerification_64Bit server API.

parameterdescription.para: Subsystem ID.
Lower 32 bit address of the XSecure_RsaSignParams structure
Higher 32 bit address of the XSecure_RsaSignParams structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the Rsa sign verification is successful
XST_FAILURE - If there is a failure
Validate internal address fields in the copied structure

briefdescription.para: This function calls respective IPI handler based on the API_ID.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the command structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS - If the handler execution is successful
XST_INVALID_PARAM - If Cmd is NULL or API ID is invalid
XST_FAILURE - If there is a failure
Call the respective API handler according to API ID

briefdescription.para: This function checks if the data in the provided buffer is non-zero.

parameterdescription.para: - Pointer to the buffer which contains data to be validated
- Size of the buffer in bytes

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS In case of non-zero buffer
XST_FAILURE In case the buffer is all zeroes

briefdescription.para: RSA maximum message size in bytes.
RSA maximum PS size in bytes.
RSA maximum DB size in bytes.
RSA default key size in bytes.
RSA key generation size in words.
Maximum keys that needs to be generated.
RSA maximum quant size for 2048 bit key.
RSA maximum quant size for 3072 bit key.
RSA maximum quant size for 4096 bit key.
256 bytes size of first prime factor(P)
256 bytes size of first prime factor(Q)
No of writes or reads to RSA RAM buffers.
for RSA private decryption data should be lesser than modulus
